title: Man
content:
In his own image the Creator made,
His own pure sunbeam quicken�d thee, O man!
Thou breathing dial! since thy day began
The present hour was ever mark�d with shade!
meaning:
"Man" is a quintessential example of Walter Savage Landor's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
